name: Goody Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, nuts, and butter. Press into a 13x9 pan to form the bottom layer.
2. Mix together the powdered sugar and cream cheese until thoroughly blended.
3. Spread over the top of the bottom layer.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Cool and cut into small squares. Nuts can be omitted if desired.
